item.title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
item.dc:creator: Maggie Nye, Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red tape.

item.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: Google announced on Thursday that it will begin rolling out Gemini to cars with Google built-in, marking a significant upgrade from the current Google Assistant. The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience. The announcement follows closely behind news from General Motors, which revealed yesterday that Gemini is […]

item.title: TikTok’s new ‘Campus Hub’ features college group chats and feeds
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The new hub features dedicated college group chats and personalized feeds designed to help students stay connected with their campus communities, even while they’re away for the summer.

item.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

item.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Szkutak
item.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

item.title: Uber taps Hertz to clean, charge, and fix its Lucid Motors robotaxis
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Hertz is creating a new affiliate company called "Oro Mobility" to provide fleet management solutions "across a range of mobility segments."

item.title: SpaceX backer 137 Ventures raises $700M for two growth-stage funds
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: VC firm 137 Ventures has raised over $700 million to back growth-stage startups. Its portfolio includes SpaceX, Anduril, Hadrian.

item.title: Dental practice software maker fixes bug that exposed patients’ medical records
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: The security bug is now fixed, but the patient who found it said it was challenging to alert the software company about the issue.

item.title: X announces a rebuilt ad platform powered by AI
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: X is rolling out a rebuilt ads platform powered by AI as it works to grow revenue again.

item.title: Spotify introduces verified artist badges to help distinguish humans from AI
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: Spotify looks for an identifiable artist presence both on and off platform, like concert dates, merch, and linked social accounts on their artist profile.

item.title: Netflix wants you to watch ‘Clips,’ its TikTok-like vertical video feed
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Netflix is redesigning its mobile app and introducing Clips, a vertical video feed intended to help users discover new content by sharing highlights from original Netflix programming.

item.title: Meta says its business AI now facilitates 10 million conversations a week
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Meta said over 8 billion advertisers have used at least one of its GenAI tools

item.title: Instagram cracks down on content aggregators
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The update targets content aggregators that don't post original content and instead simply re-upload others' posts.

item.title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: You need infrastructure to build AI and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

item.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

item.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

item.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin, Jagmeet Singh
item.description: The maker of Claude has received multiple preemptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
item.dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
item.description: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

item.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

item.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.
